Defines RTC backup register constants for boot and system state tracking.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines a set of preprocessor macros for backup data registers used in a real-time clock (RTC) system. Each macro maps a descriptive name to a specific RTC backup data register, such as `RTC_BKP_DR0` through `RTC_BKP_DR19`. These macros are used to store and retrieve various system states and configuration values, such as boot information, bootloader version, current time, and reboot reasons. The file uses `#pragma once` to ensure it is included only once in a compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. The macros facilitate easy reference to specific RTC registers, improving code readability and maintainability.
